title: Phegopteris kinabaluensis
taxonomy: Phegopteris kinabaluensis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Borneo, specifically in the mountainous regions of Sabah, Malaysia. The classification of Phegopteris kinabaluensis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Dryopteridaceae, Genus: Phegopteris, Species: P. kinabaluensis. The genus Phegopteris belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a large and diverse family of ferns. Phegopteris kinabaluensis is a rare and endemic species.
